Class ServerSessionsApi

java.lang.Object
com.github.copilot.generated.rpc.ServerSessionsApi
@Generated("copilot-sdk-codegen") public final class ServerSessionsApi extends Object
API methods for the sessions namespace.
Since:
1.0.0

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<SessionsBulkDeleteResult>
    bulkDelete(SessionsBulkDeleteParams params)
    Session IDs to close, deactivate, and delete from disk.

    Session IDs to test for live in-use locks.

    Session ID to close.

    Remote session connection parameters.

    enrichMetadata(SessionsEnrichMetadataParams params)
    Session metadata records to enrich with summary and context information.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsFindByPrefixResult>
    findByPrefix(SessionsFindByPrefixParams params)
    UUID prefix to resolve to a unique session ID.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsFindByTaskIdResult>
    findByTaskId(SessionsFindByTaskIdParams params)
    GitHub task ID to look up.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsForkResult>
    fork(SessionsForkParams params)
    Source session identifier to fork from, optional event-ID boundary, and optional friendly name for the new session.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsGetBoardEntryCountResult>
    getBoardEntryCount()
    Session ID whose board entry count should be returned.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsGetEventFilePathResult>
    getEventFilePath()
    Session ID whose event-log file path to compute.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsGetLastForContextResult>
    getLastForContext(SessionsGetLastForContextParams params)
    Optional working-directory context used to score session relevance.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsGetPersistedRemoteSteerableResult>
    getPersistedRemoteSteerable()
    Session ID to look up the persisted remote-steerable flag for.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsGetRemoteControlStatusResult>
    getRemoteControlStatus()
    Wrapper for the singleton's current status.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsGetSizesResult>
    getSizes()
    Map of sessionId -> on-disk size in bytes for each session's workspace directory.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsListResult>
    list()
    Optional source filter, metadata-load limit, and context filter applied to the returned sessions.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsLoadDeferredRepoHooksResult>
    loadDeferredRepoHooks()
    Active session ID whose deferred repo-level hooks should be loaded.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsOpenResult>
    open()
    Open a session by creating, resuming, attaching, connecting to a remote, or handing off.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsPollSpawnedSessionsResult>
    pollSpawnedSessions()
    Cursor and optional long-poll wait for polling runtime-spawned sessions.
    CompletableFuture<SessionsPruneOldResult>
    pruneOld(SessionsPruneOldParams params)
    Age threshold and optional flags controlling which old sessions are pruned (or simulated when dryRun is true).
    CompletableFuture<SessionsRegisterExtensionToolsOnSessionResult>
    registerExtensionToolsOnSession(SessionsRegisterExtensionToolsOnSessionParams params)
    Params to attach an extension loader's tools to a session.

    releaseLock()
    Session ID whose in-use lock should be released.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    reloadPluginHooks(SessionsReloadPluginHooksParams params)
    Active session ID and an optional flag for deferring repo-level hooks until folder trust.
    CompletableFuture<Void>
    save()
    Session ID whose pending events should be flushed to disk.

    setAdditionalPlugins(SessionsSetAdditionalPluginsParams params)
    Manager-wide additional plugins to register; replaces any previously-configured set.

    setRemoteControlSteering(SessionsSetRemoteControlSteeringParams params)
    Patch for the singleton's steering state.

    • open
